notableEvents.label: Chase DeLauter GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Chase DeLauter grounds into a double play, first baseman Luis García Jr. to shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Luis García Jr. José Ramírez out at 2nd. Chase DeLauter out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan grounds into a double play, shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Luis García Jr. Kyle Manzardo out at 2nd. Steven Kwan out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Drew Millas reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman José Ramírez. Daylen Lile to 3rd. Jacob Young to 2nd. Fielding error by third baseman José Ramírez.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Young GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Young grounds into a double play, third baseman José Ramírez to second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Dylan Crews out at 2nd. Jacob Young out at 1st.
